action.reasoning: Observation: Best avg_precision now 0.2024 (val AP 0.2246) with 1536/5-layer MLP on 4096-dim r2+r3 Morgan FP after 120 epochs; loss reaches 0.0037 (possible overfitting), no jsonl metrics logged (curves uninformative), train.py truncated in workspace. PyG imports still segfault. Analysis: Capacity can be increased (2048-dim, 6 layers) with tuned dropout=0.1, lower init LR=3e-4, higher patience=25, 150 epochs for better convergence on imbalance (masked BCE+pos_weight already solid). Full non-truncated train.py with per-epoch jsonl logging enables curves; BN kept for stability, grad_clip added. This should push test AP higher without OOM (params ~80M) or new deps. Caches speed up. Decision: Rewrite model/train/predict.py for updated arch/defaults + complete robust code/logging, run training, submit_eval on best.pt.
